codeReview.summary: The feature lands the intended cross-area cleanup: it removes the stray root scratch files, updates SKILL.md to cover local-mode commands, and fixes the discovered local-search regression by taking the stored embedding dimension from index metadata before running hybrid search. The implementation matches the behavior described in the handoff and commit, and the shared search-service change correctly benefits both CLI and MCP callers. The only gap I found is that the search-service fix shipped without an automated regression test, so this behavior is currently protected only by manual verification.

issues.description: The local-search dimension fix is implemented here, but the commit adds no automated regression test covering a locally indexed repo whose stored embedding dimension differs from config.embedding.max_stored_dim. That leaves this cross-provider/local-search path guarded only by manual verification.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission shared state gives conflicting guidance about where writeable validation repos should live. AGENTS.md forbids modifying files outside the Vera repo root, but the shared library tells cross-area validators to use temp repos under /tmp. The worker then created /home/lamim/test_repo_langs outside the repo, which suggests the current guidance is not aligned.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:22 says 'Do not modify files outside the Vera repo root'. .factory/library/user-testing.md:136 says cross-area flows should use '/tmp/vera-test-cross/flask', and the transcript skeleton includes 'mkdir -p /home/lamim/test_repo_langs'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill does not fit this verification-heavy cross-area feature cleanly. It requires ADR review and failing tests first, but the transcript skeleton shows a validation/cleanup workflow instead, and the discovered Rust fix was shipped without following that procedure. Either the skill needs an explicit exception for integration/cleanup features or these features should use a lighter-weight execution skill.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: implementation-worker/SKILL.md:33 requires reading relevant ADRs and SKILL.md:40-42 requires failing tests first. The transcript skeleton shows mission.md, validation-contract.md, and SKILL.md reads, but no docs/adr reads or failing-test step; the handoff also reports tests.added=[] and tests.updated=[].

summary: Pass overall: the commit removes the scratch files, updates SKILL.md for local-mode command coverage, and fixes the metadata-dimension bug that was blocking local search on newly indexed language samples. I noted one non-blocking review issue (missing automated regression coverage for the new search-service behavior) plus two shared-state observations about conflicting temp-repo guidance and the mismatch between this feature type and the implementation-worker skill procedure.
